{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320153015C9C579CDC646A7C4216C"}"},"total":27779},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6926960964684414976","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看过很多系统流和开局无敌流的，但是这本小说思路别出心裁，让人看了有眼前一亮的感觉，几种风格揉在一起但并不突兀，反而让人觉得别出心裁，剧情轻松幽默，也让人有阅读欲，笔风也很有功底，没有冗杂的身体或者面容上的那种描写也是深得我心。如果能把高层神界或者仙界和中国古代神话引用或者提上一笔，我觉得那将会是很大的点睛之笔。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1612808808,"group_id":"6868911357538864135","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3HWQ+0oCnpa3LUNliGUpaU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"109638816698","user_name":"用户10963881"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"109638816698","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1641960913,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6868911357538864135","book_info":{"abstract":"又名《我什么时候成了玄幻传说》
陈平安穿越修仙界，努力修炼了几年，看着自己还是毫无修为，便觉得自己不是修仙的料子，于是每天就听系统的话，每天喂鸡喂鱼，洗衣种菜。
但某一天，一个绝美仙子的出现，他有条不紊的凡人生活突然被打乱。
“仙子，你在跟我开玩笑吗？我是前辈？这公鸡是凤凰？这鱼是神龙？就连这菜刀，也是神器？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/3916a8907565788aa4b81e54f51f8a12","author":"戏柳先生","author_id":"","book_id":"6868911357538864135","book_name":"玄幻：我什么时候无敌了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8a890","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":843,"name":"迪化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=843&name=迪化&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6868912309398405639","read_count":"31853","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3755454"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"1685","tags":"玄幻脑洞,无敌,玄幻,系统,东方玄幻,架空,打脸,搞笑轻松,魂穿,迪化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/e5
